24:29 â August 15, 2024
Update to the Deposit Processing, Dishonour and Return of Cheques Parts
We added content to the Deposit Processing Part and the Dishonour and Return of Cheques Part regarding new maximum face values for select types of BC Employment and Assistance cheques.
Clearing and Deposits Volume
Deposit Processing Part
Section 5.6, BC Employment and Assistance Cheques
For Imprest cheques issued at the Ministry of Social Development and Poverty Reduction Offices or Imprest cheques issued at the Ministry of Children and Family Development Offices, the maximum face value of the cheques canât exceed $3,000.
Dishonour and Return of Cheques Part
Section 7.1, Requesting Reimbursement for Fraudulent or Non-Fraudulent BC Employment and Assistance Cheques
For Imprest cheques issued at the Ministry of Social Development and Poverty Reduction Offices or Imprest cheques issued at the Ministry of Children and Family Development Offices, the maximum face value of the cheques canât exceed $3,000.
